news.title:

401,337 shares were traded at Rs. 1,077.55 per share.
news.summary:

news.title:
FMCG majors Nestle, HUL, Godrej Consumer, and Dabur face Q4 pressure due to crude price hikes and supply chain issues.
Nestle, HUL, Godrej, and Dabur report varying growth, with factors like palm oil, crude, and Amla prices impacting margins.
news.summary:
FMCG majors Nestle, HUL, Godrej Consumer, and Dabur face Q4 pressure due to crude price hikes and supply chain issues.
Nestle, HUL, Godrej, and Dabur report varying growth, with factors like palm oil, crude, and Amla prices impacting margins.

news.title:
Nuvama and Nomura see over 50% upside potential for Godrej Consumer Products, citing strong domestic demand and easing input cost pressures.
India's home and personal care categories drive growth, while international markets, especially Indonesia, show recovery with easing competition.
news.summary:
Nuvama and Nomura see over 50% upside potential for Godrej Consumer Products, citing strong domestic demand and easing input cost pressures.
India's home and personal care categories drive growth, while international markets, especially Indonesia, show recovery with easing competition.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer shares rose 4% post Q4 update; Nomura retains 'Buy'.
Company reports steady demand, normalized trade channels, and eased food inflation.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer shares rose 4% post Q4 update; Nomura retains 'Buy'.
Company reports steady demand, normalized trade channels, and eased food inflation.

news.title:
Gallantt Ispat, CreditAccess Grameen, Shyam Metalics, and GCPL gain post Q4 updates; Gallantt up 13%.
CreditAccess disbursements up 28%, Shyam Metalics' steel sales rise 59%, GCPL warns of margin hit.
news.summary:
Gallantt Ispat, CreditAccess Grameen, Shyam Metalics, and GCPL gain post Q4 updates; Gallantt up 13%.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Godrej Consumer with ₹1,425 target, citing ~10.5% India revenue growth, strong GAUM growth.
Indonesia stabilization, stable margins, and confidence in managing FY27 cost inflation support positive outlook.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Godrej Consumer with ₹1,425 target, citing ~10.5% India revenue growth, strong GAUM growth.
Indonesia stabilization, stable margins, and confidence in managing FY27 cost inflation support positive outlook.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley keeps neutral on Godrej Consumer with Equal Weight rating.
Target price for Godrej Consumer is set at ₹1,159 by Morgan Stanley.
news.summary:

news.title: Goldman Sachs maintains Buy rating on Godrej Consumer with a positive outlook.

news.title:
Brokerages target ICICI Bank, Hindalco, Godrej Consumer, DMart, IndiGo; offer sector insights.
Jefferies flags ICICI Lombard risks; BofA upgrades DMart; Citi reiterates Godrej Consumer Buy rating.

news.title:
Nomura reaffirms 'Buy' on six stocks, including Hindustan Aeronautics, Adani Ports, Dabur, Marico, FSN E-Commerce, and Godrej Consumer, with 24-62% upside.
Key drivers include strong order pipelines, demand recovery, margin resilience, and diversified business operations across sectors.
news.summary:
Nomura reaffirms 'Buy' on six stocks, including Hindustan Aeronautics, Adani Ports, Dabur, Marico, FSN E-Commerce, and Godrej Consumer, with 24-62% upside.
Key drivers include strong order pipelines, demand recovery, margin resilience, and diversified business operations across sectors.

news.title: Citi reports strong Q4 momentum for Godrej Consumer, exceeding 6% growth forecast.
news.summary: Citi reports strong Q4 momentum for Godrej Consumer, exceeding 6% growth forecast.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer expects a 6-9% cost hit if crude and palm oil prices stay high, but plans strategic measures to offset impacts.
It forecasts double-digit standalone sales growth, stable EBITDA margins, and stabilization in its Indonesia business with mid-single-digit volume growth.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer expects a 6-9% cost hit if crude and palm oil prices stay high, but plans strategic measures to offset impacts.
It forecasts double-digit standalone sales growth, stable EBITDA margins, and stabilization in its Indonesia business with mid-single-digit volume growth.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks' Q4FY26 revenue rose 19.1% YoY; Godrej Consumer expects double-digit sales growth.
IRFC disbursed Rs. 1,000 Cr loan; Aurobindo reported positive Phase 3 trial results for biosimilar BP11.
news.summary:

news.title:

news.summary:

news.title:

Pradeep Kumar will oversee India Sales, SAARC, GCPL International, and global sales capabilities development.
